items.title: Three Russian diplomats expelled from Austria over spying accusations
items.dek: They gathered information using a "forest of antennas" installed on top of diplomatic buildings, the foreign minister says.
items.body: They gathered information using a "forest of antennas" installed on top of diplomatic buildings, the foreign minister says.

items.title: Britney Spears pleads guilty to reckless driving after arrest
items.dek: The 44-year-old will avoid jail time after her arrest in California earlier this year.
items.body: The 44-year-old will avoid jail time after her arrest in California earlier this year.
